# kDNSServiceErr_NATPortMappingDisabled | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ dnssd ](/documentation/dnssd)

- [ kDNSServiceErr_NATPortMappingDisabled ](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceErr_NATPortMappingDisabled)

-  kDNSServiceErr_NATPortMappingDisabled 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceErr_NATPortMappingDisabled

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceErr_NATPortMappingDisabled: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceErr_NATPortMappingDisabled#Discussion)

The NAT gateway supports PCP, NAT-PMP or UPnP, but support is disabled by the administrator.
